message:
fix(node): use logical clock for trust card timestamps and support SHA256 prefix matching in quarantine

Make trust card revocation and quarantine operations deterministic by
replacing wall-clock timestamps with the logical now_secs parameter:

- main.rs: Add rfc3339_timestamp_from_secs() helper that converts a
  unix timestamp to RFC3339 via chrono::DateTime::from_timestamp(),
  with safe fallback to epoch for out-of-range values.

- revoke_trust_card(): Replace chrono::Utc::now() with
  rfc3339_timestamp_from_secs(now_secs) so revocation timestamps
  are deterministic given the same input clock — critical for
  replay-auditable trust operations.

- quarantine_trust_cards(): Same wall-clock→logical-clock fix.
  Additionally, extend artifact hash matching to support prefix
  matching (hash.starts_with(artifact)) alongside exact equality,
  enabling operators to quarantine by SHA256 prefix rather than
  requiring the full 64-character hex digest.

- trust_card.rs: Update demo_registry artifact hashes from generic
  "sha256:aaa..." to "sha256:deadbeef..." prefix to enable testing
  the new prefix-matching quarantine behavior.

- New tests: trust_revoke_uses_logical_now_secs_for_timestamps and
  trust_quarantine_matches_sha256_prefix_and_uses_logical_now_secs
  verify both fixes with controlled clock values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1215,7 +1215,7 @@ pub fn demo_registry(now_secs: u64) -> Result<TrustCardRegistry, TrustCardError>
             provenance_summary: ProvenanceSummary {
                 attestation_level: "slsa-l3".to_string(),
                 source_uri: "https://registry.example/acme/auth-guard".to_string(),
-                artifact_hashes: vec!["sha256:".to_string() + &"a".repeat(64)],
+                artifact_hashes: vec![format!("sha256:deadbeef{}", "a".repeat(56))],
                 verified_at: "2026-02-20T12:00:00Z".to_string(),
             },
             reputation_score_basis_points: 920,
@@ -1265,7 +1265,7 @@ pub fn demo_registry(now_secs: u64) -> Result<TrustCardRegistry, TrustCardError>
             provenance_summary: ProvenanceSummary {
                 attestation_level: "slsa-l2".to_string(),
                 source_uri: "https://registry.example/beta/telemetry-bridge".to_string(),
-                artifact_hashes: vec!["sha256:".to_string() + &"b".repeat(64)],
+                artifact_hashes: vec![format!("sha256:deadbeef{}", "b".repeat(56))],
                 verified_at: "2026-02-20T12:00:01Z".to_string(),
             },
             reputation_score_basis_points: 680,
